atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports to the clinic for a surgical consult regarding a biopsy of a lesion on her back.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient first noticed a lesion on her right inferior back approximately one month ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that her dermatologist performed a biopsy, which revealed melanoma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that her mother and sister both had melanoma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that her grandfather had pancreatic cancer.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any prior skin cancers.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is allergic to augmentin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient owns an auto repair shop and occasionally smokes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient had previous surgeries for her gall bladder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient had previous surgeries for her appendix.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination revealed a one centimeter shave biopsy site with no residual pigmentation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is a soft lymph node in the right groin, which is nontender.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: No other suspicious moles were identified on examination.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient presents with a newly diagnosed melanoma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes an ultrasound of the right groin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a wide local excision with a one to two centimeter margin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes skin graft closure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to schedule the ultrasound.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to discuss the procedure with the patient.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to follow up with the patient in four weeks.
